title: HasteGenesis
body:
# HasteGenesis is a wip mod adding six gems (and maybe some more features coming later :3) to the game, all with unique buffs and abilities :D # ![promo image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c2768dd2778a22f80486084cd9e29c9695dcb1.png) a player holding a Vigor Gem

This is all for latest snapshot (found in the github)

(I'm writing this as I make the updates)

 ##

Extra Info

All Gems | Gems | Images | |:-:|:-:| | The **Pyro Gem** applies passive fire resistance and instantly extinguishes the player when held in the players hand, upon **Left Click** it damages all nearby enemies for four damage while also setting them on fire | ![pyro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4v0Yvamm/images/d64df6e6120228229a6c0ff09cdeb6f711dcac87.png) | | The **Aqua Gem** grants the player a passive increase in swimming speed and allows the player to breathe underwater, upon **Right Click**, if submerged in water, the player heals five health | ![aqua](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4v0Yvamm/images/8a0e1b3eeaba1d989fadd165ebbdf98a15ac6a3a.png) | | The **Bolt Gem** passively increases your movement, attack and mining speed, upon **Right Click** the player gets another boost to their speed and mining speed for ten seconds, upon **Left Click** all nearby enemies are struck by lightning | ![bolt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4v0Yvamm/images/b3bbdae136279570439227c33aac06a605b04949.png) | | The **Vigor Gem** passively increases the players strength and jump height while also slightly increasing the players gravity, alongside granting extra armor points | ![vigor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4v0Yvamm/images/34860ef9cbf3dcdb5e980288c506af5a568e180c.png) | | The **Life Gem** passively give the player resistance and an extra half a bar of health, upon **Right Click** it grants the player extra saturation, upon **Left Click** all nearby enemies are damaged and their health is temporarily added to the player | ![life](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4v0Yvamm/images/61a6bfd90a043048de5355e6ecd6ceddadb46bb1.png) | | The **Stellar Gem** passively lowers the players gravity while also making them immune to fall damage, upon **Right Click** the players gravity is toggled off/on, upon **Left Click**, all nearby enemies are launched into the air | ![stellar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4v0Yvamm/images/77eb29c14590ebca1bf3d4bc050d256e927909b3.png) |
##

Q&A

**

Q: Can i use this project in my published modpacks?

**

A: of course, as long as the download stays hosted within the modrinth ecosystem!

**

Q: How do I get gems back if I lose them?

**

A: Simply enter the command "/trigger use_if_your_gem_is_gone"!

**

Q: How do I change the cooldowns for the gems?

**

A: First, toggle your operator status (/function hastegenesis:admin/toggle_is_operator), then you will have access to all the operator "/trigger" commands which includes cooldowns.

**

Q: How do I restore all the settings for cooldowns?

**

A: Type the "/function hastegenesis:admin/restore/restore_default_cooldown_settings" command and it should restore the cooldowns.
